alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the nitrate oxoanion, with the formula NO3-.
alternative_parents.name: Organic nitrates

alternative_parents.description: Compounds having the nitro group, -NO2 (free valence on nitrogen), which may be attached to carbon, nitrogen (as in nitramines), or oxygen (as in nitrates), among other elements (in the absence of specification, C-nitro compounds are usually implied).
alternative_parents.name: Organic nitro compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an organonitric acid group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic nitric acids

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one nitrogen atom and one carbon atom linked to each other.
alternative_parents.name: Azacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds having two amino groups bonded to the same carbon,  R2C(NR2)2 where R can by a hydrogen or an alkyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Aminals

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds consisting of an assembly of cations and anions.
alternative_parents.name: Organic salts

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Compounds formally derived from ammonia by replacing one, two or three hydrogen atoms by hydrocarbyl groups, and having the general structures RNH2 (primary amines), R2NH (secondary amines), R3N (tertiary amines).
alternative_parents.name: Amines

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds with a positive electric charge.
alternative_parents.name: Organic cations

class.description: Compounds containing a triazinane ring, which is a six-membered saturated heterocycle with  three nitrogen ring atoms and three ring carbon atoms.
class.name: Triazinanes

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as 1,3,5-triazinanes. These are triazinanes having three nitrogen ring atoms at the 1-, 3-, and 5- positions.

direct_parent.description: Triazinanes having three nitrogen ring atoms at the 1-, 3-, and 5- positions.
direct_parent.name: 1,3,5-triazinanes

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Triazinanes having three nitrogen ring atoms at the 1-, 3-, and 5- positions.
subclass.name: 1,3,5-triazinanes

superclass.description: Compounds containing a ring with least one carbon atom and one non-carbon atom.
superclass.name: Organoheterocyclic compounds
